last_prompt: Add tests for the GitHub Issues integration. Mock the GitHub REST API (using httpmock or wiremock, or a simple tokio TCP server) to verify: (1) a POST to /repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues is made when a task transitions to InProgress, (2) a PATCH request to close the issue is made when the task reaches Completed or Failed, (3) when github_issues_enabled is false, no HTTP calls are made, (4) a GitHub API error (e.g. 401 Unauthorized) logs a warning and does not abort the loop. Run `cargo test` to confirm all tests pass.
